EN_ORIGINAL.101012: Hey guys! I'm here to see Gideon.
EN_ORIGINAL.101022: Go ahead, Leo! He's in there.
EN_ORIGINAL.101032: What?! Are you just gonna let him in like that? Without even searching him?
EN_ORIGINAL.101033: Despite all the terrorist attacks over the last few days?
EN_ORIGINAL.101042: Oh come on... it's Leo! Gideon's protégé! He hangs out here almost every day.
EN_ORIGINAL.101052: It goes against LUNARK's security protocols. I should report your negligence.
EN_ORIGINAL.101053: Sorry, kiddo, if you want to get in, you'll have to prove that you're not armed.
EN_ORIGINAL.101054: Press ❄ to show me your inventory and I'll open the door.
EN_ORIGINAL.101132: We're not here to "chill out," moron.
EN_ORIGINAL.101133: Unlike you, I'm here to do my job.
EN_ORIGINAL.102012: They govern us and yet we build them. How crazy is that?
EN_ORIGINAL.103013: I saw him go to the Quality Control room.
EN_ORIGINAL.103322: Good! I must admit, it's quite satisfying to control these droids.
EN_ORIGINAL.103323: It's not as much fun when it's the other way around.
EN_ORIGINAL.103332: Oh, no, I meant your meeting with Gideon.
EN_ORIGINAL.103342: Oh! This time he's asking me to do some archeology using my so-called "abilities"...
EN_ORIGINAL.103352: Was he talking about your face that can scare wild animals away?
EN_ORIGINAL.103353: Hahahaha! Just kidding! I like your little kitty face!
EN_ORIGINAL.103362: Don't worry, I'm used to it.
EN_ORIGINAL.104013: Have you watched the news? There's been another attack on one of our factories.
EN_ORIGINAL.104014: These rebels are out of control.
EN_ORIGINAL.104022: I saw that. Rumor is there hasn't been a single human casualty.
EN_ORIGINAL.104032: No casualties? The casualty is our entire society, man.
EN_ORIGINAL.104033: NOAH's directive is to protect our colony. Why would anyone want to destroy him?
EN_ORIGINAL.104312: When I'm talking to someone really boring...
EN_ORIGINAL.104313: ...I wish I could skip the entire conversation by holding ☟ or something.
EN_ORIGINAL.104322: Yeah, that would be really convenient.
EN_ORIGINAL.105013: I've got another assignment for you. Let's talk in my office.
EN_ORIGINAL.105032: Got something on your mind? Spill it, kid.
EN_ORIGINAL.105042: Well, you promised me I could operate one of those droids, remember?
EN_ORIGINAL.105053: Ok, fine. Go to the control panel up there. Don't make me wait too long.
EN_ORIGINAL.105112: Come back as soon as you're done with the droids.
EN_ORIGINAL.105113: The control panel is just down there.
EN_ORIGINAL.105212: You can play with the droids again after we finish this conversation if you want.
EN_ORIGINAL.105214: You know that even though you're... "different," I've always helped you.
EN_ORIGINAL.105215: I gave you a roof, an education, a job.
EN_ORIGINAL.105222: As long as I can remember... yes, you did, and I'm gratef...
EN_ORIGINAL.105232: The time has come to pay me back.
EN_ORIGINAL.105233: I need you and your "abilities" to track down a very ancient artifact.
EN_ORIGINAL.105252: Go back to your ship. I just transferred the coordinates to your navigation system.
EN_ORIGINAL.105253: Oh! I almost forgot... take this, you're gonna need it.
EN_ORIGINAL.105312: You can play with the droids again after we finish this conversation if you want.
EN_ORIGINAL.105314: You know that even though you're... "different," I've always helped you.
EN_ORIGINAL.105315: I gave you a roof, an education, a job.
EN_ORIGINAL.105322: As long as I can remember... yes, you did. I'm gratef...
EN_ORIGINAL.105332: The time has come to pay me back.
EN_ORIGINAL.105333: I need you and your "abilities" to track down a very ancient artifact.
EN_ORIGINAL.105352:
Go back to your ship. I just transferred the
coordinates to your navigation system.
EN_ORIGINAL.106112: So, apparently I need to bring this droid to the glowing plate.
EN_ORIGINAL.106113: The controls are gonna be displayed on the giant monitor.
EN_ORIGINAL.106114: It's like playing a video game!
EN_ORIGINAL.106212: Takes some getting used to, but it's definitely fun!
EN_ORIGINAL.106213: Let's see what Gideon wants before I try again.
EN_ORIGINAL.106312: Let's see if I got any better.
EN_ORIGINAL.107012: Just a couple more gigs and I'll have enough cash to upgrade your magnetic stabilizer.
EN_ORIGINAL.108012: A list of names, probably employees of the month or something...
EN_ORIGINAL.108013: Daniel "CoDi" Ludwig, Adam R Pippin, Anders Dalvander, Derk-Jan Karrenbeld...
EN_ORIGINAL.108014: Kai Luotojoki, Jonathan Brisavoine, DefMech, Arthur Bárbaro, James Latzer...
EN_ORIGINAL.108015: Oh, no, wait, wait, wait. My bad... These are the work accidents from last month.
EN_ORIGINAL.109013: Hard to believe it used to be the Earth's moon.
EN_ORIGINAL.109014: I'd love to know what it's like to live up there.
EN_ORIGINAL.109015: Stop daydreaming. There's no way I'll ever have that kind of money.
EN_ORIGINAL.200000: Find the ancient artifact Gideon asked you to recover.
EN_ORIGINAL.200100: Find the ancient artifact Gideon asked you to recover.
EN_ORIGINAL.201012: The corpse of a mercenary. Probably the one who wrote on those stones.
EN_ORIGINAL.201013: He won't need that Shield Cell anymore.
EN_ORIGINAL.201014: These shields only work if you stay still.
EN_ORIGINAL.201015: I should press ◎ to use it.
EN_ORIGINAL.202012: Oh, I see you have 3 $hells, let me offer you something in return.
EN_ORIGINAL.202112: Long and peaceful life, my friend.
EN_ORIGINAL.202122: How... how did you get here?
EN_ORIGINAL.202132: To put it simply, let's say we share similar abilities.
EN_ORIGINAL.202133: I assume you're here for the artifact. I won't stop you from taking it.
EN_ORIGINAL.202152: Your human friends call us the Immortals, but you can call me Hugg.
EN_ORIGINAL.202153: By the way, if you find some $hells and our paths cross again...
EN_ORIGINAL.202154: ...I'll give you a very valuable gift in exchange for 3 of them.
EN_ORIGINAL.205012: "Long jump: run a bit with ⇶ then ↷"
EN_ORIGINAL.209012: "Hold ⇶ during a short or long jump to grab onto a ledge"
EN_ORIGINAL.210012: "Briefly press ↑ and hold ⇶ to hang on a ledge above"
EN_ORIGINAL.301012: Hey, Terry. Rio's not here today?
EN_ORIGINAL.301022: It's gonna be MISTER Terry to you, kid. And no, that coward resigned this morning.
EN_ORIGINAL.301023: «Toxic work environment» or whatever lame excuse you can think of. Pfff.
EN_ORIGINAL.301033: I'm here to see Gideon again. Can you let me pa...
EN_ORIGINAL.301042: Wait a minute... What is that THING hooked up to the hull of your wreck?
EN_ORIGINAL.301062: It looks like a... GRAVITATIONAL BOMB?!
EN_ORIGINAL.301112: Hang on, I'll get you a medic!
EN_ORIGINAL.301122: You traitor, you... *cough* you won't get out of here alive...
EN_ORIGINAL.302022: Leo... the explosion... it wasn't supposed to happen like that...
EN_ORIGINAL.302023: You have to leave! *cough* NOAH will send the droids after you...
EN_ORIGINAL.302032: There's no way I'm leaving you here!
EN_ORIGINAL.302042: You must bring the artifact to my place... only you can solve the mystery...
EN_ORIGINAL.302043: Go through that hatch to get through the building, then head for the sewers.
EN_ORIGINAL.302044: Leo... *cough* the building's security system has been activated. Be careful!
EN_ORIGINAL.303012: Maybe I can get out of the building through that vent after I talk to Gideon.
EN_ORIGINAL.350000: Look for a way out of the building.
EN_ORIGINAL.350400: Look for a way out of the building.
EN_ORIGINAL.350600: Reach the manhole leading to the street.
EN_ORIGINAL.351013: We've seen your picture on every TV. What's up with this whole bombing thing?
EN_ORIGINAL.351014: I'm sure you have nothing to do with this.
EN_ORIGINAL.351022: Thanks, Happy. No idea what happened, but I intend to find out.
EN_ORIGINAL.351023: Why are you all gathered here?
EN_ORIGINAL.351032: We've been stuck here ever since the alarm system went off. Can you help us?
EN_ORIGINAL.351042: Of course. What do you need?
EN_ORIGINAL.351052: You see that big switch above me? It unlocks the emergency exit back there.
EN_ORIGINAL.351053: I can open the door above, but none of us can reach it.
EN_ORIGINAL.351062: Ok, you can count on me.
EN_ORIGINAL.351072: Thank you, buddy. Let me open the door.
EN_ORIGINAL.351112: Hurry up, man. I'm not going to stand in front of that sensor forever.
EN_ORIGINAL.351113: Also, be careful. The building's automatic defense system might be activated.
EN_ORIGINAL.351312: Going through that door with us is probably not a great idea.
EN_ORIGINAL.351313: There must be about 20 droids waiting for you on the other side.
EN_ORIGINAL.351314: You should take that elevator to the basement.
EN_ORIGINAL.352032: Oh, your paw's stuck... Here, let me help you.
EN_ORIGINAL.353012: Excuse me, sir. Is there a way to leave the building?
EN_ORIGINAL.353022: Of course, kid! If I was in the mood, I could easily stop the traffic...
EN_ORIGINAL.353023: ...which could allow you to reach a manhole up there.
EN_ORIGINAL.353024: But I'm feeling down because my dog hasn't been back since the building's lockdown.
EN_ORIGINAL.353512: Hey, you found Smockey, didn't you? Thank you SO much!
EN_ORIGINAL.353513: I can stop the cars now, so you can reach the manhole.
EN_ORIGINAL.353612: Hurry up! I can't stop the traffic any longer. They'll send someone soon.
EN_ORIGINAL.354012: Do you know that you can cling to a platform that seems inaccessible...
EN_ORIGINAL.354014: No need to press ↷ ! It's automatic!
EN_ORIGINAL.355012: I don't know what you've done, but every one of LUNARK's droids is coming after you.
EN_ORIGINAL.355013: Between you and me, I'd be very happy if you could give them a run for their money.
EN_ORIGINAL.356012: I was pretty sure you were a troublemaker.
EN_ORIGINAL.356013: It's always the same with you freaks. You can't be trusted.
EN_ORIGINAL.357012: Is it true what they say? Are you suffering from accelerated aging?
EN_ORIGINAL.357022: I'd rather speak about something else if you don't mind.
EN_ORIGINAL.358012: Oh, I see you have 3 $hells. Let me offer you something in return.
EN_ORIGINAL.358112: Long and peaceful life, my friend.
EN_ORIGINAL.358122: H... How did you get here so fast?
EN_ORIGINAL.358132: Once in symbiosis with the flora, it can be the vehicle of our body envelope.
EN_ORIGINAL.358133: Perhaps you have already experienced it yourself?
EN_ORIGINAL.358134: Fruits that give you energy? Roots regenerating your bruised body?
EN_ORIGINAL.358152: And remember my offer: if you find some $hells and our paths cross again...
EN_ORIGINAL.358153: ...I'll give you a very valuable gift in exchange for 3 of them.
EN_ORIGINAL.400000: Go to Gideon's building in Zone A.
EN_ORIGINAL.400100: Talk to Maggi at the Bar.
EN_ORIGINAL.400304: Talk to Oddvar on the roof.
EN_ORIGINAL.401012: Hi! Can I get you something?
EN_ORIGINAL.401022: No thanks, my wallet burned in my ship.
EN_ORIGINAL.401032: First time I've heard that one...
EN_ORIGINAL.401033: If only these robotic bullies would stop extorting us, life would be a little easier.
EN_ORIGINAL.401112: Hi! I'd like to talk to Oddvar.
EN_ORIGINAL.401122: I don't know who you are talking about.
EN_ORIGINAL.401132: Oh, I come on behalf of Mahdi.
EN_ORIGINAL.401142: Mahdi? Is that right? Next time you see him tell him to come and wipe his slate clean.
EN_ORIGINAL.401212: You know, as a bartender I hear a lot of stories.
EN_ORIGINAL.401213: I've been told that people who look like you suffer from accelerated aging. Is this true?
EN_ORIGINAL.401222: Well, probably. I don't know how much time I have though.
EN_ORIGINAL.401223: Downside of being one of the few of my kind I guess.
EN_ORIGINAL.405012: Excuse me... Looks like I'm in Zone F of the city. How do I get to Zone A?
EN_ORIGINAL.405022: Well, actually, you can't, unless you can fly...
EN_ORIGINAL.405023: ...and even then you'd probably be shot on sight.
EN_ORIGINAL.405312: Is it true? You're going to fight the Swordroid gang?
EN_ORIGINAL.405313: I don't want to be around when that happens.
EN_ORIGINAL.405412: Thank you for your help, and good luck.
EN_ORIGINAL.406012: Why is this guy being manhandled?
EN_ORIGINAL.406022: Who? Rich? He's always late in paying his taxes.
EN_ORIGINAL.406042: That's one of their purposes, yes.
EN_ORIGINAL.406043: Don't mess with the Swordroids. On top of raking us, they can be dreadful warriors.
EN_ORIGINAL.406044: Those who try to resist pay the highest price...with interest.
EN_ORIGINAL.406312: Be careful. They know how to handle swords as well as I know how to handle scissors.
EN_ORIGINAL.406412: I hope you guys will be safe for a while.
EN_ORIGINAL.406422: Oh, don't worry. You know what they say...
EN_ORIGINAL.406423: Don’t mess with a hair stylist. We get paid to cut people.
EN_ORIGINAL.407012: Final warning: Please adjust your tax balance immediately.
EN_ORIGINAL.407013: Place your payment card on my chest.
EN_ORIGINAL.407022: That's unfair! You guys granted me a payment spread!
EN_ORIGINAL.407023: The file number is in my restaurant... right... there...
EN_ORIGINAL.407032: Error 912. Please comply before physical persuasion sequence.
EN_ORIGINAL.407312: The Swordroid dropped me all of a sudden and went west. Are you going after it?
EN_ORIGINAL.407332: Please shoot a couple of bullets on my behalf.
EN_ORIGINAL.407412: Thanks, Leo. I owe you my life. You're welcome at my restaurant any time.
EN_ORIGINAL.408012: Hi! Can you tell me how to get to Zone A?
EN_ORIGINAL.408022: The only way would be to climb over this wall. But I wouldn't recommend it.
EN_ORIGINAL.408042: Even if you were lucky enough to survive the droids...
EN_ORIGINAL.408043: ...you'd be disintegrated by the lasers atop the wall.
EN_ORIGINAL.408052: I might need to see those lasers you're talking about.
EN_ORIGINAL.408062: Then go talk to Oddvar. He lives in a house above the shops.
EN_ORIGINAL.408063: Ask Maggi the bartender to give you access. Tell her Mahdi sent you.
EN_ORIGINAL.408112: Still want to climb that wall?
EN_ORIGINAL.408113: Then go talk to Oddvar. He lives up there.
EN_ORIGINAL.408114: Ask Maggi the bartender to give you access. Tell her I sent you.
EN_ORIGINAL.408212: Go and talk to Oddvar. He should be able to help you if you still want to get to Zone A.
EN_ORIGINAL.408312: So you're really going to take on those droids.
EN_ORIGINAL.408313: I hope what's waiting for you behind that wall is worth it.
EN_ORIGINAL.408412: Dude, you're incredible! We owe you a great deal.
EN_ORIGINAL.408413: If you neutralized the lasers, then there's not much danger between you and Zone A.
EN_ORIGINAL.408414: At least for a man with your skills.
EN_ORIGINAL.409012: Hey there! What brings you to Zone F?
EN_ORIGINAL.409032: It's been broken for as long as I can remember.
EN_ORIGINAL.409033: That's what motivated me to go to engineering school, actually.
EN_ORIGINAL.409034: That city is broken as well, but I'm gonna fix it, starting with this elevator.
EN_ORIGINAL.409312: Very pleased to see that I am not the only one who wants to help this community.
EN_ORIGINAL.410012: Since the window above the club is broken...
EN_ORIGINAL.410013: ...we can have fun throwing stones at the droid.
EN_ORIGINAL.411012: Did you know that by shooting the missiles you can send them back?
EN_ORIGINAL.412012: In my opinion, the best way to escape a close combat situation is to roll with ↺.
EN_ORIGINAL.412022: How do you know that? You're only 5 years old!
EN_ORIGINAL.413012: Do you use your shields by pressing ◎?
EN_ORIGINAL.413022: They break on impact, but can get you out of complicated situations.
EN_ORIGINAL.413032: Weirdly enough, adults tend to hide them in crates. No idea why. We're just kids.
EN_ORIGINAL.414012: You need to access my rooftop, am I right?
EN_ORIGINAL.414013: I guess you could destroy the generator that powers the wall's defenses with your gun.
EN_ORIGINAL.414022: And I guess that there's one prerequisite...
EN_ORIGINAL.414032: Haha yes. Straight to the point, I like that. The deal is simple:
EN_ORIGINAL.414033: Destroy the Swordroids gang and I'll open that door.
EN_ORIGINAL.414053: Good luck. You're gonna need it.
EN_ORIGINAL.414312: You must seek out and destroy all the Swordroids if you want access to my rooftop.
EN_ORIGINAL.414412: Wow. I'm speechless. That was impressive.
EN_ORIGINAL.414413: You must be valuable to them for their leader to come.
EN_ORIGINAL.414414: Now you can destroy that generator and cross the wall.
EN_ORIGINAL.414512: The generator is down. Watch out for the missiles when you climb the wall.
EN_ORIGINAL.415012: I don't know what your secret ingredient is, but I feel like this juice gives me energy!
EN_ORIGINAL.415022: It's just that unappetizing red fruit that can be found all around Albaryne.
EN_ORIGINAL.416012: There's a lot going on with this rebellion against the dictat-, uh, the government...
EN_ORIGINAL.416013: ...even after the arrest of their leader, Kalvin, last year. What's your take on this?
EN_ORIGINAL.416022: I don't really know what to make of it. My whole world fell apart a few hours ago.
EN_ORIGINAL.416023: I guess I've always looked at those events from a somewhat privileged position.
EN_ORIGINAL.416032: I won't judge. Let's do our best with the cards we've been dealt.
EN_ORIGINAL.416033: Starting by treating my little family to this delicious barbecue!
EN_ORIGINAL.416042: It smells great. They're very lucky!
EN_ORIGINAL.416312: Wow, so you're a Resistance fighter after all?
EN_ORIGINAL.416412: Dude, I'll have to build a statue of you! How brave!
EN_ORIGINAL.417012: Did you see the explosion on top of the factory? What fireworks!
EN_ORIGINAL.417022: Well yes... I had a front row seat, actually.
EN_ORIGINAL.417032: Since the factory's down, I'm connecting our electrical system to another source.
EN_ORIGINAL.417312: Unsolicited advice: When the Swordroids use their scimitar as a shield...
EN_ORIGINAL.417313: ...make it last as long as possible. They'll get tired and lower their guard.
EN_ORIGINAL.417322: Thanks. I'll try to remember that.
EN_ORIGINAL.417412: The whole neighborhood is so happy after what you've done...!
EN_ORIGINAL.417413: It's good to see them regain hope. Even if LUNARK will send new droids soon enough.
EN_ORIGINAL.418012: These Swordroids want me to pay more taxes...
EN_ORIGINAL.418013: ...but no one will come to my club since they terrorize the neighborhood.
EN_ORIGINAL.418312: Glad you're trying to take them down. I hope you won't have to fight their chief, though.
EN_ORIGINAL.418313: I'd hate to have to add your name to the memorial plaque on the wall.
EN_ORIGINAL.418412: Word of your bravery is spreading. I already had 2 clients from Zone E tonight.
EN_ORIGINAL.419012: At school we're preparing the festivities for the 300th anniversary of the Great Arrival.
EN_ORIGINAL.419032: It's the day LUNARK entered Albaryne's orbit.
EN_ORIGINAL.419052: That's the planet we live on, silly!
EN_ORIGINAL.420012: Did you know that LUNARK used to be called the Moon...
EN_ORIGINAL.420013: ...and it was the only natural satellite of a planet called Earth, the home of humankind?
EN_ORIGINAL.420022: I wonder if any humans have survived on Earth.
EN_ORIGINAL.421012: When the earthlings understood that their planet was doomed...
EN_ORIGINAL.421013: ...they entrusted their fate to a super computer called NOAH, built on the Moon.
EN_ORIGINAL.421022: Then NOAH used the Moon as a giant spaceship to bring human embryos here!
EN_ORIGINAL.422012: It took 31 years for LUNARK to travel from Earth to Albaryne.
EN_ORIGINAL.422013: Only a handful of scientists were awake to look after NOAH. The embryos were frozen.
EN_ORIGINAL.422032: Legend has it that only one survived the trip. No one knows what happened to him.
EN_ORIGINAL.424012: Oh, I see you have 3 $hells. Let me offer you something in return.
EN_ORIGINAL.424112: Long and peaceful life, my friend.
EN_ORIGINAL.424122: Figures I'd run into you at the most inaccessible place.
EN_ORIGINAL.424132: Well, I prefer to remain unnoticed.
EN_ORIGINAL.424133: For the Humans, our very existence must remain a legend, a rumor.
EN_ORIGINAL.424134: Otherwise, he would have captured us all long ago to carry out his experiments.
EN_ORIGINAL.424152: Nevermind. Don't forget to bring me 3 $hells.
EN_ORIGINAL.426012: I could pet cats all day long, it's so relaxing.
EN_ORIGINAL.701022: Oh, man. I have no idea... Let's try this:
EN_ORIGINAL.701112: PLEASE ENTER THE ACCESS CODE... AGAIN.
EN_ORIGINAL.701212: DO YOU REALLY KNOW THE ACCESS CODE?
EN_ORIGINAL.701222: OK, OK. Focus. It must be that one:
EN_ORIGINAL.701233: NO... SORRY, I WAS ATTEMPTING A JOKE TO LIGHTEN THE MOOD.
EN_ORIGINAL.701234: PLEASE DO NOT SHOOT ME WITH ◬
EN_ORIGINAL.702012: I had no idea that Gideon played the piano.
EN_ORIGINAL.702013: It's strange, some of the keys have numbers engraved on them.
EN_ORIGINAL.702112: It opened a passage up there in the bookshelves.
EN_ORIGINAL.703012: It looks like the same technology used in the ruins where I found the artifact.
EN_ORIGINAL.703212: The artifact acted as a power source...
EN_ORIGINAL.704012: It looks just like the lower part of the machine.
EN_ORIGINAL.704312: What is it? A map or something?
EN_ORIGINAL.704313: If Gideon was part of the resistance and was willing to do whatever it takes...
EN_ORIGINAL.704314: ...to get his hands on this map, it means that what it indicates must be invaluable.
EN_ORIGINAL.704315: Maybe a weapon to destroy NOAH and LUNARK?
EN_ORIGINAL.705012: Did Gideon leave any kind of message for me? The name's Leo.
EN_ORIGINAL.705022: I'm not allowed to talk about the residents of the building.
EN_ORIGINAL.705023: Move along or I'm calling the droids.
EN_ORIGINAL.800000: Go to the location indicated by the orb.
EN_ORIGINAL.801012: I saw the LUNARK droids shoot at you from the building...
EN_ORIGINAL.801013: You are one of those terrorists... What is your plan? To blow up the entire train?
EN_ORIGINAL.801022: Absolutely not! I'm not here to hurt anybody!
EN_ORIGINAL.801032: If you take one more step, I'll activate the train's defense system!
EN_ORIGINAL.801042: Please don't do this! You'll put everyone at risk.
EN_ORIGINAL.801052: Do you think I'm stupid? All of you deserve to rot in jail.
EN_ORIGINAL.801112: You don't stand a chance! Ha ha ha!
EN_ORIGINAL.802012: Ah, the train driver! I have to get to the coordinates indicated by this orb.
EN_ORIGINAL.802013: Do you know if it's still far?
EN_ORIGINAL.802022: Not too far, no. There's just one small problem...
EN_ORIGINAL.802023: I was in the *cough* bathroom when the lasers went off.
EN_ORIGINAL.802024: Since then, it has been impossible for me to return to my seat, let alone stop the train.
EN_ORIGINAL.802025: Just imagine what will happen when we reach the terminus at such a speed.
EN_ORIGINAL.802032: Oh... Okay... Don't panic. There must be a solution.
EN_ORIGINAL.802033: I've dealt with this safety system before. You just have to disable the generator.
EN_ORIGINAL.802042: It is in that room up there...
EN_ORIGINAL.802043: ...but this is the only door I can't open remotely.
EN_ORIGINAL.802062: Yes, through the roof. I opened the access from car 4, but it's suicidal.
EN_ORIGINAL.802072: My life expectancy is short anyway. Might as well put my remaining time to good use.
EN_ORIGINAL.802212: Hurry up and disable the lasers so we can stop this train.
EN_ORIGINAL.802213: Time is running out! Go through the roof from car 4.
EN_ORIGINAL.802312: Well done! Hurry to the engine and stop the train. There's no time to waste!
EN_ORIGINAL.803012: If you want to go further, you'll have to deal with these missile launchers.
EN_ORIGINAL.803032: I am a weaponologist! My friends rightly call me Weapon. Need some advice?
EN_ORIGINAL.803033: Tip 1: Take your time and watch how they shoot.
EN_ORIGINAL.803034: Tip 2: You can send the missiles back by shooting at them twice.
EN_ORIGINAL.803035: This will knock out the missile launcher and give you time to make it through.
EN_ORIGINAL.803036: But they can't be completely destroyed, so don't waste your time trying!
EN_ORIGINAL.803037: Tip 3: If you shoot a missile just once, it falls. This can come in useful.
EN_ORIGINAL.803052: You are welcome! You sure are lucky you ran into me!
EN_ORIGINAL.804012: Hey there. Why are you hiding behind those boxes ?
EN_ORIGINAL.804022: Please don't turn me in, I'm nobody! I just want to be... far away.
EN_ORIGINAL.804023: Hold on a second. Your face, your grey hair. Are you one of them?
EN_ORIGINAL.804032: One of whom? What are you talking about?
EN_ORIGINAL.804042: They did some more then. I... I shouldn't have hacked their servers...
EN_ORIGINAL.804043: I'll never be safe, and neither will you! Live what time you have left far from them!
EN_ORIGINAL.805012: If you could open that door down there... this missile launcher would do the job for you.
EN_ORIGINAL.805013: I just wish the switch wasn't on the roof of the train!
EN_ORIGINAL.901012: The train's emergency shutdown has also deactivated the security system.
EN_ORIGINAL.901013: You should be able to keep going without too much trouble.
EN_ORIGINAL.901032: These caves look deep and narrow. Maybe you'll have to make half turns...
EN_ORIGINAL.901033: ...by dropping down to catch the opposite ledge. Can you do it?
EN_ORIGINAL.901042: I guess we'll know pretty soon.
EN_ORIGINAL.901052: You'll be fine. Hold ⇶ to stay hanging from a ledge, press the opposite direction...
EN_ORIGINAL.901053: ...and keep ⇶ pressed when you're falling if you want to catch the next ledge.
EN_ORIGINAL.903012: Another engraving shaped like a hand.
EN_ORIGINAL.904022: Hi, Leo. I am Mother. I am the one who has seen and experienced the most.
EN_ORIGINAL.904023: Come talk to me when you have met everyone.
EN_ORIGINAL.904024: My friends are looking forward to meeting you.
EN_ORIGINAL.904112: Three hundred years ago, a new moon appeared in the sky of Albaryne.
EN_ORIGINAL.904113: Severe meteorological phenomena devastated our cities and killed many of us.
EN_ORIGINAL.904114: Not long after, a human and its army of droids came to hunt down the survivors.
EN_ORIGINAL.904115: My people were persecuted, imprisoned, and taken to that moon they called LUNARK.
EN_ORIGINAL.904122: LUNARK is responsible for all this? It's a far cry from what you read in the history books.
EN_ORIGINAL.904123: Everyone believes that Albaryne was uninhabited when the human settlers arrived.
EN_ORIGINAL.904124: Also, why so much hostility towards your species?
EN_ORIGINAL.904132: The man behind this genocide is said to have succeeded in unlocking the secret of...
EN_ORIGINAL.904133: ...our immortality and to have considerably extended his own life expectancy.
EN_ORIGINAL.904134: Unfortunately, he regularly needs test subjects.
EN_ORIGINAL.904152: If you have found us, then he is not far away now.
EN_ORIGINAL.904153: We've reached a pivotal moment in our destiny.
EN_ORIGINAL.904154: You still have a very important part to play. Don't let him make you think otherwise.
EN_ORIGINAL.904162: Who is not far away? And what does this have to do with me?
EN_ORIGINAL.905012: Oh, I see you have 3 $hells. Let me offer you something in return.
EN_ORIGINAL.905112: Normally I'd greet you with my usual "long and peaceful life"...
EN_ORIGINAL.905113: ...but I feel that you are reaching the end of your journey.
EN_ORIGINAL.905122: Yeah, deep down I can feel it too.
EN_ORIGINAL.905123: There are still so many things I want to try before... you know... I die.
EN_ORIGINAL.905132: Keep the faith. Go talk to Grey down there. Maybe he can do something about that.
EN_ORIGINAL.906012: Hugg told me a lot about you. You are a strange creature.
EN_ORIGINAL.906013: Half human, half like us Immortals.
EN_ORIGINAL.906014: Not the first of your kind, but definitely the most fascinating.
EN_ORIGINAL.906022: Half like you? Well, I'd settle for being half immortal.
EN_ORIGINAL.906032: I know about your short life span. I'm working on a cure and it's quite promising.
EN_ORIGINAL.906033: Go see Mother when you've met everybody. She can't wait to talk to you.
EN_ORIGINAL.907012: Hugg told me you were... immortals?
EN_ORIGINAL.907022: In fact, we are called Immortals because we cannot die of old age.
EN_ORIGINAL.907023: However, we can die from disease, starvation, accident...
EN_ORIGINAL.907024: ...and also from being tortured by humans seeking the secret of our longevity.
EN_ORIGINAL.908012: Amazing. We have so much in common.
EN_ORIGINAL.908013: You were even able to activate our mechanisms. Unlike your predecessors.
EN_ORIGINAL.909012: I spent half my life hiding underground.
EN_ORIGINAL.909013: I hope Mother is right to have faith in you.
EN_ORIGINAL.910012: Rumor has it that I'm not the first of my kind.
EN_ORIGINAL.910013: What do you know about this?
EN_ORIGINAL.910022: Yes, that's right. You're not the first. Every few generations...
EN_ORIGINAL.910023: ...a being of your kind has surfaced. Each time the same characteristics:
EN_ORIGINAL.910024: Exceptional athleticism, unique physical traits, short life span.
EN_ORIGINAL.910025: However, you are the first one with whom we feel such a strong connection.
EN_ORIGINAL.911012: You beat a Zirneklis Queen. Twice actually! I'm impressed.
EN_ORIGINAL.911022: That giant spider? Well, she just kinda killed herself to be honest.
EN_ORIGINAL.912012: I see that you have found us using the Orb.
EN_ORIGINAL.912013: We left it behind in the unlikely event that another of our kind would want to find us.
EN_ORIGINAL.912014: We never imagined that it could be used to hunt us down.
EN_ORIGINAL.912022: I never had any intention of hunting you down!
EN_ORIGINAL.912023: To tell the truth, I wasn't sure what to expect when I followed these coordinates.
EN_ORIGINAL.913023: I should be. Roughly 300 years ago, actually.
EN_ORIGINAL.913024: Now thanks to you and your new friends, I will live a thousand years longer.
EN_ORIGINAL.913034: You... You discovered I had these abilities when you found me...
EN_ORIGINAL.913035: ...so you kept me around all these years just to lead you to their hiding place?
EN_ORIGINAL.913043: Except that I did not FIND YOU.
EN_ORIGINAL.913063: And I did it for this purpose only.
EN_ORIGINAL.913064: TERRY! Lock him up in the penitentiary where he will rot for what's left of his life.
EN_ORIGINAL.913082: The big cats are coming with me to LUNARK.
EN_ORIGINAL.1000050: Lure the guard into the cell.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001012: It's about time. I thought you were in a coma! Can you walk?
EN_ORIGINAL.1001022: I'm fine, thank you, I have a big headache th...
EN_ORIGINAL.1001032: Great. Listen to me carefully, pal, 'cause we don't have much time.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001033: I just needed a cellmate for my escape plan to work.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001034: You don't look very smart but you'll do. I can't be picky.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001042: Whoa, chill out, Santa. After what I've just been through, I'm not really in the mood.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001043: Why should I help you in the first place?
EN_ORIGINAL.1001052: Do you want to rot here? Don't you have a cat lady waiting for you at home?
EN_ORIGINAL.1001063: All right, let's say I'm in. What's the plan?
EN_ORIGINAL.1001072: First, we need to lure a guard inside the cell.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001112: Well, go ahead! What are you waiting for! Knock him out!
EN_ORIGINAL.1001122: Okay, so I'm basically doing everything...
EN_ORIGINAL.1001212: Damn, wrong guard. You'll have to take care of the one upstairs.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001232: We need the one with the key. Come on, lad!
EN_ORIGINAL.1001233: Don't get spotted or the alarm will go off and some drones will swoop in.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001234: Wait until he turns around, follow him, and knock him out as soon as you get a chance.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001312: Not too bad for a mutant!
EN_ORIGINAL.1001333: Now we split up. Me, I'm going through the air ducts.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001334: That's the only way to enter the control room. I'll open it for you from the inside.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001335: You, you're gonna snatch the keys from the guards and unlock the area's doors.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001336: Otherwise, I can't move forward. Any questions?
EN_ORIGINAL.1001352: Damn it! Guard have key, you knock out guard, you pick up key, ...
EN_ORIGINAL.1001353: ...blue key opens blue door, green key opens green door, etc... you understand?
EN_ORIGINAL.1001412: Nice! Next you'll have to unlock the green area.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001542: You took out a dozen elite guards with your bare hands...
EN_ORIGINAL.1001543: ...you have an outstanding level of endurance...
EN_ORIGINAL.1001544: ...and you were locked up with me in the most secure cell in the penitentiary.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001552: My name is Leo. I am... I don't really know anymore. A lab rat?
EN_ORIGINAL.1001553: I was created as a tool for hunting down the last Immortals: the natives of Albaryne.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001562: Hmm... I've heard of them. Always thought it was a myth. Also, sorry for your... condition.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001572: Kalvin as in, "Kalvin the resistance leader arrested last year"?!
EN_ORIGINAL.1001582: More like, "Kalvin doesn't want to be killed here, so let's hurry up."
EN_ORIGINAL.1001583: Go and get your gun up there. I'll explain the rest later.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001612: Here's the rest of the plan: I'm gonna open all the cells to create a diversion.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001613: Given your skills, I'll be the one staying here and opening the doors for you.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001614: You'll go to the hangar and steal a rescue pod.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001632: I'll come when you've secured the path.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001633: Be careful, the droids ahead are no joke.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001712: I had to barricade myself in the control room.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001713: Let me open the stair door for you.
EN_ORIGINAL.1001812: Leo! I found the maintenance reports! Do not take the pod on the left!
EN_ORIGINAL.1002712: Behind the next door there's one... no, two droids! I see them on the monitors.
EN_ORIGINAL.1002713: I suggest that you roll to get out of a bad situation.
EN_ORIGINAL.1002812: Leo! I found the maintenance reports! Do not take the pod on the right!
EN_ORIGINAL.1003412: That was the last door. I misjudged you, boy. You're full of surprises.
EN_ORIGINAL.1003413: Meet me at the control room. I'll open it for you from the inside.
EN_ORIGINAL.1003712: You still in one piece, pal?
EN_ORIGINAL.1003722: It looks like it. How much further to the hangar?
EN_ORIGINAL.1003732: Um, something came up. You mind a little detour?
EN_ORIGINAL.1003733: From what I could dig up here, there would be sensitive documents...
EN_ORIGINAL.1003734: ...regarding the security of LUNARK. Especially the access points.
EN_ORIGINAL.1003742: What, you really want to go up to LUNARK?
EN_ORIGINAL.1003752: This has been our target for years: dealing with the problem at its source!
EN_ORIGINAL.1003753: It's imperative that we recover these files and bring them back to our headquarters.
EN_ORIGINAL.1003762: I don't know, it seems rather dangerous to m...
EN_ORIGINAL.1003772: Haha! Like you've got a choice! I remind you that I'm the one controlling the doors.
EN_ORIGINAL.1003773: The files are in a terminal identical to the one in the control room.
EN_ORIGINAL.1003774: The resistance is counting on you!
EN_ORIGINAL.1004712: Come talk to me when you have the files. You can do it!
EN_ORIGINAL.1004762: Lad, you have no idea of the value of what you have in your pocket.
EN_ORIGINAL.1004763: Final stretch to the hangar. Hurry up!
EN_ORIGINAL.1005712: Well, I have bad news and... more bad news.
EN_ORIGINAL.1005732: Okay. I'm not going to come with you, pal. It's getting pretty goddamn hot in here.
EN_ORIGINAL.1005742: What? Hold on, I'll come back for you!
EN_ORIGINAL.1005743: Go hide in the vents and wait for me!
EN_ORIGINAL.1005752: No way! You're going to bring these files to my daughter, Farah. She's leading us now.
EN_ORIGINAL.1005753: Displaying the coordinates of our HQ on your screen right now.
EN_ORIGINAL.1005762: Wait wait wait, that was the least bad news? What's the worst?
EN_ORIGINAL.1005772: One of these two pods is defective and... I don't know which one.
EN_ORIGINAL.1005782: What? You can dig up top-secret plans but not a simple maintenance report?
EN_ORIGINAL.1005783: Ok... nevermind... whatever... I'll pick one!
EN_ORIGINAL.1005784: You better get out of this or... I'll kill you myself, okay?!
EN_ORIGINAL.1005792: Hey kiddo, when you find my daughter down there...
EN_ORIGINAL.1005793: ... you tell her I'm sorry, all right?
EN_ORIGINAL.1005813: All right... Let's pick one of those escape pods now.
EN_ORIGINAL.1006022: Oh my god! MackZee is alive?!
EN_ORIGINAL.1006032: Yes, and he asked me to tell you the news. But how did you guess?
EN_ORIGINAL.1006042: He's the only person who calls me that.
EN_ORIGINAL.1006043: I'm so happy! I thought I'd lost him forever. Thank you, thank you!
EN_ORIGINAL.1006052: Hang on. I promise we'll try and get you out of here.
EN_ORIGINAL.1006112: Thanks again. I was desperate. Knowing that he is alive will help me get through this.
EN_ORIGINAL.1007012: How did you escape? That's amazing!
EN_ORIGINAL.1007013: Can I please ask you a favor?
EN_ORIGINAL.1007032: My partner and I were separated when we were arrested.
EN_ORIGINAL.1007033: I was badly hurt and he must think I'm dead.
EN_ORIGINAL.1007034: Can you find him and tell him I'm OK?
EN_ORIGINAL.1007052: Thank you! His name is NyekonX.
EN_ORIGINAL.1007122: Yes, he's in the red area. He's fine. I'm sure you'll be reunited soon enough.
EN_ORIGINAL.1008012: GUARD! Help! There's a flood here!
EN_ORIGINAL.1008022: What? What the hell did you do?
EN_ORIGINAL.1008023: I'm coming in. Don't try anything funny.
EN_ORIGINAL.1008712: I can't leave yet. I need to check on Kalvin.
EN_ORIGINAL.1009013: Don't tell anyone what I'm about to do.
EN_ORIGINAL.1100100: Fill the syrup can up to the top.
EN_ORIGINAL.1100200: Bring the syrup can back to the boss.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101022: Oh, my head... Who are you? Where am I?
EN_ORIGINAL.1101033: We're just humble syrup farmers. You landed in our part of the forest.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101042: Nice to meet you, Mechanik. My name is Leo.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101043: What are you doing with that... thing?
EN_ORIGINAL.1101052: Oh this? It's an old teleporter I'm trying to fix. It's quite finicky.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101053: So many things that could go wrong if it was poorly tuned. I leave it to your imagination.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101054: I can take a look at your ship afterwards. I'm told I can fix pretty much anything.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101072: Ok then! Go ask my boss if she agrees. Our sugar shack is across the valley to the east.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101112: All right! I've fixed this teleporter! No need to go through the valley anymore!
EN_ORIGINAL.1101113: Now I can take a look at your ship.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101122: That's very nice of you, but your boss asked me to fill this can of syrup first.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101132: Ha ha! Why am I not surprised? Good luck with that!
EN_ORIGINAL.1101212: Bring the syrup can back to the boss so I can start working on your ship.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101322: Well, I couldn't resist. I started early!
EN_ORIGINAL.1101323: I was waiting for you before I turned it on. Are you ready?
EN_ORIGINAL.1101412: I... I'm sorry, I don't understand...
EN_ORIGINAL.1101413: Maybe by bypassing the anti-overload breaker of the magnetic stabilizer...
EN_ORIGINAL.1101414: ...it overheated the thruster's intake? I'd have to order new parts but I could...
EN_ORIGINAL.1101423: That's ok, don't sweat it. The ship was already a wreck.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101432: I still feel bad and we owe you. I'm gonna call Farah. She'll figure out something.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101442: Wait, your BOSS's name is Farah?
EN_ORIGINAL.1101482: Haha. I can't believe it! That's amazing!
EN_ORIGINAL.1101483: Don't bother calling her. I'm on my way to see her right now.
EN_ORIGINAL.1101492: What is amazing? I just blew up your ship!
EN_ORIGINAL.1102042: Wow, that's a lot of monitors to run a syrup business...
EN_ORIGINAL.1102052: What the heck do you know?! We're very busy here!
EN_ORIGINAL.1102062: Ok, sorry! My name is Leo, and you must be Mechanik's boss...
EN_ORIGINAL.1102063: We'd like your permission for her to repair my ship that crashed earlier in the forest.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102074: You collect the last 3 gallons of syrup in the most dangerous areas of the forest...
EN_ORIGINAL.1102075: ...and in exchange I'll allow Mechanik to repair your ship.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102082: Nobody ever does anything for free in this world, do they?
EN_ORIGINAL.1102112: You want Mechanik to repair your ship? Fill the syrup can I gave you.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102113: You'll have to empty the 3 syrup machines in the forest. We'll open the gates for you.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102223: Sure you don't want to join us? I could put your talent to good use.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102232: No thanks. I already have obligations, and I have little time.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102242: Fair enough. I'll hold up my end of the bargain.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102243: Go see Mechanik. She must have already started to repair your ship.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102252: Thank you and... good luck with the syrup farm.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102422: What now? Uh... no, come on! We're just...
EN_ORIGINAL.1102432: ...humble syrup farmers, I know! Don't bother, I got it all!
EN_ORIGINAL.1102434: He helped me break out of the penitentiary so that I could give you LUNARK's plans...
EN_ORIGINAL.1102442: Wait a minute, that's a lot of information to digest at once...
EN_ORIGINAL.1102472: I don't know! He was alive when I left...
EN_ORIGINAL.1102473: There's no time to waste, though.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102474: The drive we stole reveals a temporary security flaw on LUNARK.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102475: We can sneak onto the moon through one of its three reactors without being caught.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102476: I'll give you all the details during the flight.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102477: Oh, by the way, do you have a ship?
EN_ORIGINAL.1102482: Do we have A ship? Ha ha! We don't have ANY ship, we have: the MockingBird!
EN_ORIGINAL.1102483: In fact, it's thanks to you that we were able to fill up its tank!
EN_ORIGINAL.1102484: This syrup is by far the best fuel there is!
EN_ORIGINAL.1102485: We've been waiting for an opportunity like this for years.
EN_ORIGINAL.1102486: Hang on! Let's pull the plug on NOAH once and for all.
EN_ORIGINAL.1103022: Oh, you know. Just syrup farming stuff...
EN_ORIGINAL.1103032: Are you collecting syrup with... landmines?
EN_ORIGINAL.1103042: Are you from the Syrup Farming Regulation Agency?
EN_ORIGINAL.1103062: Then mind your own business. I'm just a humble syrup farmer.
EN_ORIGINAL.1103073: Hm, why can't I use the stairs?
EN_ORIGINAL.1103082: Oh. We had to close the gates. There's something really dangerous up there.
EN_ORIGINAL.1103112: Hey, be careful, okay. I almost had my head ripped off by one of these beasts once.
EN_ORIGINAL.1103212: Thank you for your help, Leo.
EN_ORIGINAL.1104012: Who are you? I've never seen your face around. I'd definitely remember it.
EN_ORIGINAL.1104022: My name is Leo, I'm... just passing through. My ship crashed in the forest.
EN_ORIGINAL.1104023: You don't know where I can find the rebels, do you?
EN_ORIGINAL.1104032: *cough* *cough* ...rebels? What rebels? I'm just a humble syrup farmer.
EN_ORIGINAL.1104033: Besides, let me finish my, uh... lemonade in peace, okay?
EN_ORIGINAL.1104112: So you agreed to help us collect the syrup? Wow, you are brave... or desperate.
EN_ORIGINAL.1104212: You don't look like much but you're pretty efficient when you're given a mission.
EN_ORIGINAL.1104222: I guess there's a compliment in there someplace. Thanks.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105012: Are you okay? You seem worried.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105022: Not exactly a happy time if you ask me.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105023: Since these beasts showed up, we can't harvest all of our syrup.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105042: They're droids, but I've never seen anything like this before.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105112: So, did you meet the boss? She's quite a woman, isn't she?
EN_ORIGINAL.1105122: You and her, are you two...
EN_ORIGINAL.1105132: Haha no! But I do respect her a lot.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105133: It wasn't easy for her to take over after her father's ... disappearance.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105134: Besides, you'd be more her type.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105142: Oh? Hmm... and what is my type?
EN_ORIGINAL.1105412: Sure you don't want to join our ranks? You'd be a pretty good syrup farmer.
EN_ORIGINAL.1105413: Besides, I know someone who wouldn't mind if you stayed around.
EN_ORIGINAL.1106012: Oh man, you look really tired. You should get some rest.
EN_ORIGINAL.1106022: Well, I have this... condition, and I can feel in my bones that it's not getting any better.
EN_ORIGINAL.1106023: I just hope I can keep my promise before...
EN_ORIGINAL.1106033: I don't believe in luck but rather that with a good mindset, good things happen!
EN_ORIGINAL.1106412: Our boss may seem a bit, well, bossy at times, but it's just a front.
EN_ORIGINAL.1106413: Since her father left us, we are even more united than ever.
EN_ORIGINAL.1106414: You could say that we are a big family gathered around a great cause...
EN_ORIGINAL.1107012: Oh, I see you have 3 $hells. Let me offer you something in return.
EN_ORIGINAL.1107112: Hugg! I'm so happy to see you again! But how?
EN_ORIGINAL.1107113: I thought Gideon took you to LUNARK with the others.
EN_ORIGINAL.1107122: I managed to escape in extremis.
EN_ORIGINAL.1107123: I felt your presence again, so I realized that you had escaped, too.
EN_ORIGINAL.1107124: Please Leo. Set my friends free.
EN_ORIGINAL.1107132: I'm working on it. Hopefully I have enough time ahead.
EN_ORIGINAL.1107142: Don't give up hope. I'm pretty sure my friend Grey will be able to cure you.
EN_ORIGINAL.1109012: This pump seems to be extracting the syrup from this tree.
EN_ORIGINAL.1109112: That one's taken care of. I emptied it.
EN_ORIGINAL.1116012: Syrup Pump B, C / Sugar Shack
EN_ORIGINAL.1200500: Find and set the Immortals free.
EN_ORIGINAL.1201013: "We just left Earth's orbit! My colleagues are already in stasis.
EN_ORIGINAL.1201014: I'm doing the last checks of NOAH systems then I'm going to join them.
EN_ORIGINAL.1201015: When we wake up, 31 earth years will have passed...
EN_ORIGINAL.1201016: ...and we'll be orbiting above Albaryne, our new home!"
EN_ORIGINAL.1202013: "It's been 3 years since LUNARK, formerly known as the Moon, left Earth's orbit.
EN_ORIGINAL.1202014: A cryogenic gas leak interrupted our stasis. If no repair is possible...
EN_ORIGINAL.1202015: ...my colleagues and I will have to spend the next 28 years of the journey awake."
EN_ORIGINAL.1203013: "I've been designing droids for 6 years. I'm getting tired of it.
EN_ORIGINAL.1203014: Once we reach Albaryne, I swear I'll turn this dump into a leisure resort.
EN_ORIGINAL.1203015: In the meantime, I have to find a new hobby. Why not genetics?
EN_ORIGINAL.1203016: With all these embryos at my disposal... who would notice if I borrow some?"
EN_ORIGINAL.1204014: James died this morning from cancer. I'm left alone.
EN_ORIGINAL.1204015: NOAH wouldn't do anything to help. All he cares about are those stupid embryos."
EN_ORIGINAL.1205013: "We arrived the day after my 55th birthday! What a sight. Albaryne is beautiful.
EN_ORIGINAL.1205014: NOAH takes care of the orbital maneuvering while I launch the colonization phase.
EN_ORIGINAL.1205015: Soon, my droids will build the infrastructure on Albaryne and welcome the first embryos."
EN_ORIGINAL.1206014: An intelligent humanoid species populates the main continent of the planet.
EN_ORIGINAL.1206015: The arrival of LUNARK has caused major climatic disturbances.
EN_ORIGINAL.1206016: Their largest cities have been completely wiped out.
EN_ORIGINAL.1206017: I have instructed my droids to bring me some specimens."
EN_ORIGINAL.1207014: It's amazing! Their cells regenerate indefinitely!
EN_ORIGINAL.1207015: I was able to extract a serum which allows me to stop the effects of time!
EN_ORIGINAL.1207016: I should look like a 57-year-old man forever!
EN_ORIGINAL.1207017: Unfortunately, I can't synthesize the molecule. I need more test subjects."
EN_ORIGINAL.1208014: I've run out of Immortals because their symbiosis with Albaryne allows them to hide.
EN_ORIGINAL.1208015: No matter. If I can't capture them, I'll re-create them with their DNA samples...
EN_ORIGINAL.1208016: ...and the human embryos I still have here on LUNARK."
EN_ORIGINAL.1209014: How ironic. All the hybrids I have created suffer from accelerated aging.
EN_ORIGINAL.1209015: I have great hope, however, for my latest subject...
EN_ORIGINAL.1209016: ...who seems to have inherited the symbiosis the Immortals share with their environment.
EN_ORIGINAL.1209017: I have estimated his lifespan at 15 to 20 years.
EN_ORIGINAL.1209018: That should be enough time to send him out to find the last Immortals."
EN_ORIGINAL.1209020: Wait... was he talking about... me?
EN_ORIGINAL.1210012: Where are we supposed to find the tipster you told me about?
EN_ORIGINAL.1210022: Celcius? Oh, he's much more than a tipster.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210023: He is a hell of a hacker. He's been undercover on LUNARK for years.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210024: If anyone can give us access to NOAH, it's him.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210032: Getting there with that door, Mechanik?
EN_ORIGINAL.1210112: Is there a problem with the elevator?
EN_ORIGINAL.1210122: It cannot be operated from this floor.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210132: Someone will have to climb the elevator shaft and send it to us from up there.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210212: Sorry Leo, but you took so long that we thought you were probably... um...
EN_ORIGINAL.1210213: Anyway! Finally I managed to trigger the elevator from down there.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210222: Ok folks, there is no need to draw unwanted attention by staying together.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210223: Mechanik, you'll stay here to cover our bases.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210612: Phew, you're back! One more minute and I was going to take your place.
EN_ORIGINAL.1210613: Are you ready for the big showdown?
EN_ORIGINAL.1210622: I don't really know what's waiting for me, but I can assure you that neither does NOAH.
EN_ORIGINAL.1211012: I'll stay with the MockingBird and keep an eye out.
EN_ORIGINAL.1211062: Don't worry. We'll get them back to Albaryne safely.
EN_ORIGINAL.1212012: Is this your first time on LUNARK, too?
EN_ORIGINAL.1212022: No. I have no memory of it, but I was actually born somewhere around here!
EN_ORIGINAL.1212032: Oh? Let's hope you don't behave like a salmon.
EN_ORIGINAL.1212052: Yes, that fish on Earth that swims upriver to its birthplace to... you know...
EN_ORIGINAL.1212412: What do you know about this Celcius?
EN_ORIGINAL.1212422: He definitely likes money. We never got anything for free from him.
EN_ORIGINAL.1212423: However, he never gave us a single piece of information that wasn't 100% accurate.
EN_ORIGINAL.1212425: He hates LUNARK as much as we do, if not more.
EN_ORIGINAL.1212612: I'm a little bit busy here...
EN_ORIGINAL.1212613: Why don't you go check on Celcius and Farah instead?
EN_ORIGINAL.1213022: Good job, Mechanik! Now follow me.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213212: Good luck, Leo. I've got your back.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213522: I have to free my friends. They're imprisoned somewhere in the laboratory.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213532: In the laboratory? I'm coming with you!
EN_ORIGINAL.1213542: Thanks, but I'd rather you help Farah and Rik evacuate everyone.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213553: Surviving in this part of the station is no easy feat. Good luck.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213612: Your visit to the lab did not go unnoticed.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213613: Don't worry, we managed to evacuate everyone before they attacked.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213622: Are Farah and Rik still in the club?
EN_ORIGINAL.1213632: Yeah. They're holding off the droids...
EN_ORIGINAL.1213633: ...while Celcius extracts NOAH's coordinates and programs the teleporter.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213812: Oh my god... is LUNARK really leaving?
EN_ORIGINAL.1213822: Glad we're all safe and sound here...
EN_ORIGINAL.1213832: Except for Leo. He's still up there.
EN_ORIGINAL.1213843: By the way, has anyone seen Farah?
EN_ORIGINAL.1213852: I saw her heading back to the MockingBird.
EN_ORIGINAL.1214012: Whoa! Where do you think you're going, Lion-O?
EN_ORIGINAL.1214032: Take it easy, Spider. It's Leo. He's with us.
EN_ORIGINAL.1214042: Oh, it's you, Farah. Sorry, I didn't recognize you.
EN_ORIGINAL.1214043: You can pass, but be quiet, I don't want any trouble this time.
EN_ORIGINAL.1214052: Don't worry. They got the father. They won't get the daughter.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215012: Celcius, this is Leo. He's the one who got us this incredible shot today.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215022: Hi, kid. I've never heard Farah say anything good about anyone...
EN_ORIGINAL.1215024: There's a teleporter in my storage room that can take you directly to NOAH...
EN_ORIGINAL.1215025: ...but to set it up, I need that disk you found in the penitentiary.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215032: Very well. But first you're gonna give me the key to the station's laboratory.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215052: Farah, I promised I'd free my friends.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215053: I'll take care of NOAH when everyone is safe.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215062: You're a man of honor. I respect that.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215072: Okay, fine. While you free your friends and Celcius extracts the coordinates of NOAH...
EN_ORIGINAL.1215082: Here is the yellow key. It'll open the first door.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215083: You'll need more, but for that you'll be on your own.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215512: Don't forget: as soon as you have freed the Immortals, you come back right here.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215522: The lab is one of the most protected areas in LUNARK. Be really careful.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215612: Ah, you're here! The teleporter is ready. Farah is waiting for you up there.
EN_ORIGINAL.1215613: Hurry up! I don't know how long we can hold them off.
EN_ORIGINAL.1216012: Leo! I knew you would come.
EN_ORIGINAL.1216022: I'm glad you're all still alive. I was afraid I was too late.
EN_ORIGINAL.1216023: There's no time to lose! You must get onboard the MockingBird.
EN_ORIGINAL.1216033: Now it's time for you to fulfill your destiny.
EN_ORIGINAL.1217022: I wanted to talk to you first.
EN_ORIGINAL.1217612: Wha... what did you do to me?
EN_ORIGINAL.1217632: As if... something has changed in me... I feel...
EN_ORIGINAL.1217642: You' ll have to thank Hugg. It was through studying his healing technique that...
EN_ORIGINAL.1217643: ...I figured out how to stabilize your metabolism and stop your accelerated aging.
EN_ORIGINAL.1217652: Thank you, Grey. Now I have no doubt I can take on NOAH.
EN_ORIGINAL.1218012: We're newlyweds! We saved up a long time to afford this trip to LUNARK!
EN_ORIGINAL.1218032: We thought it would be very romantic to spend our honeymoon on an actual moon!
EN_ORIGINAL.1219023: We are AI specialists and come from far away to study NOAH.
EN_ORIGINAL.1219024: Unfortunately we did not expect to be so disregarded.
EN_ORIGINAL.1220012: Playing guitar surrounded by lasers. I am literally in heaven here!
EN_ORIGINAL.1220022: Oh, now I know why there's a guitar-shaped ship in the hangar...
EN_ORIGINAL.1221012: Have a good time in our respectable establishment.
EN_ORIGINAL.1222022: Why the red fluffy toothy mask on my head?
EN_ORIGINAL.1222042: Well, what's great about LUNARK is that you can be whoever you want to be.
EN_ORIGINAL.1222043: And today, I want to be a red fluffy toothy guy.
EN_ORIGINAL.1222052: Can't you do that down on Albaryne too?
EN_ORIGINAL.1222062: Are you nuts? I have responsibilities. I can't let my employees see me like this.
EN_ORIGINAL.1224012: Did you know that there is a high-security laboratory across the lobby?
EN_ORIGINAL.1224013: No one has ever returned to tell us what they actually do there.
EN_ORIGINAL.1224015: This is most likely where the next generation of smartphones are being designed.
EN_ORIGINAL.1225023: I used to be famous... I ran that TV show on the Network... now I'm just pathetic.
EN_ORIGINAL.1225033: Your costume is splendid! You should try and get your fame back!
EN_ORIGINAL.1225042: You... you're RIGHT! I'll stop hiding!
EN_ORIGINAL.1225043: I'll go back to Albaryne and get it together!
EN_ORIGINAL.1226012: I love your red sneakers! Are you lining up to go to the club too?
EN_ORIGINAL.1226023: Actually, I can't reach the armory up there on the balcony.
EN_ORIGINAL.1226024: I was going to the club to ask if anyone had any ideas.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227012: You are tenacious, Leo. You've proven your point. I'll make some changes.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227013: Now go back to Albaryne and no harm will be done to you or your friends.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227022: It's too late, I'm coming for you, NOAH.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227062: Look, Leo. I can see you're really upset.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227063: Humans cannot survive without me, without order.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227064: To shut me down would lead to chaos, chaos to destruction, destruction to extinction.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227065: That's not what you want, is it?
EN_ORIGINAL.1227072: Just let the humans decide for themselves.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227122: You leave me no choice, Leo. I must protect my own function.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227123: I have to destroy you, for the greater good.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227132: Aren't you supposed to protect humanity?
EN_ORIGINAL.1227823: I am now taking over your teleportation device.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227912: What have you done with him? Did you... ?
EN_ORIGINAL.1227922: I cannot kill a human being.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227923: He has been taken care of.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227942: After analyzing the situation 24,129 times since you reactivated me...
EN_ORIGINAL.1227943: ...I consider myself a threat to the people of Albaryne.
EN_ORIGINAL.1227952: Wait... I don't want to go anywhere!
EN_ORIGINAL.1228012: Gideon! You are... you were... NOAH?!
EN_ORIGINAL.1228022: Oh, Leo... You had to be that stubborn.
EN_ORIGINAL.1228023: NOAH was designed to protect the embryos and wouldn't approve my experiments.
EN_ORIGINAL.1228024: I had no choice but to shut him down.
EN_ORIGINAL.1228032: Then what? You just took his place all those years?
EN_ORIGINAL.1228034: ...as an excuse to install your robotic autocracy?
EN_ORIGINAL.1228042: Humans are more docile when it is not one of them who is responsible for their fate.
EN_ORIGINAL.1228043: It's easier to justify their cowardice by blaming a machine.
EN_ORIGINAL.1228052: That's enough, Gideon! You need to stop!
EN_ORIGINAL.1228062: Ha ha ha! You're no match for me, Leo.
EN_ORIGINAL.1228072: Maybe, but I know who is, and I'm gonna wake him up!
EN_ORIGINAL.1228612: The shields of the lasers' generators are deactivated when he is wounded...
EN_ORIGINAL.1228613: I've gotta hurry. This is my chance to destroy them!
EN_ORIGINAL.1229012: This ship reminds me of a comic book I read when I was younger...
EN_ORIGINAL.1230012: This transporter belongs to a certain Fred... Hmm, not a very common name.
EN_ORIGINAL.1230013: This is probably the Fred I ran into at the bar in Zone F.
EN_ORIGINAL.1231012: No way! Same model as my old ship but all chrome!
EN_ORIGINAL.1231013: This one is in mint condition, a collector's item!
EN_ORIGINAL.1231014: It belongs to... Spider? Oh, no more spiders please.
EN_ORIGINAL.1232012: This transporter belongs to Jason Riggs.
EN_ORIGINAL.1233012: This model does not bring back good memories...
EN_ORIGINAL.1234012: What the hell! Is this ship shaped like a... guitar?
EN_ORIGINAL.1234013: How can it even stand up?
EN_ORIGINAL.1235012: Holy moly! A class-A Dragonfly! I never thought I'd get this close to one in my life.
EN_ORIGINAL.1235013: The owner's name is Erbil. Good for you, Erbil.
EN_ORIGINAL.1236012: Wow, I like this one! It belongs to Deepnight.
EN_ORIGINAL.1236013: Deepnight? I think I met that guy on the train...
